nasb.text: Who eat the flesh of my people, Strip off their skin from them, Break their bones And chop them up as for the pot And as meat in a kettle.”

esv.text: who eat the flesh of my people, and flay their skin from off them, and break their bones in pieces and chop them up like meat in a pot, like flesh in a cauldron.

cnv.text: 你們吃我民的肉， 剝他們的皮， 打斷他們的骨頭， 切成像鍋裡的塊， 像釜中的肉塊。

ccb.text: 你们吃我百姓的肉， 剥我百姓的皮， 打碎他们的骨头， 把他们切成块， 如同下在锅里、放进釜中的肉。
